span.p:
Claude - Augment Agent
top tier, expensive
acts directly ONLY when human asks directly
otherwise asks MimicClaude first

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LocalContextModel
qwen2.5-coder 7b + nomic-embed
kept loaded by Ollama, free

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LocalContextAgent
saves trainings / learnings / history
scheduled tasks + future MCP-Worker
internal id: chost

cold-path / clone-worker
notifier / bake-off / auto-checkpoint
